title:
Hey, you! If you've got a website and you want some free advice about improving it, join my Patreon - I'll give you a free membership if you drop me a PM.

Here's what I've written about so far:

- Writing a Good Service / Category Page
- Finding a Reputable Online Marketer
- Structuring your site
- What to blog about?
- Product photos
